description_long: This object consists of three small, cylindrical barrels with a classic wooden appearance, grouped together on a dark blue, curved surface. Each barrel features visible wood grain texture and is reinforced with horizontal metal bands, giving them a rustic, traditional look. The barrels are compact and appear to be made from staves of wood, held together by the metallic hoops. The tops of the barrels are flat and closed, with no visible openings or lids. The barrels are arranged closely, with one slightly tilted on its side, suggesting they are lightweight and easily movable. Their size and design indicate they are likely used for storage or decorative purposes in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A group of three small, wooden barrels with metal bands, arranged on a dark blue surface. The barrels are compact, rustic, and closed at the top.
description_view_0: Three small wooden barrels grouped together, with one barrel lying on its side and two upright, all visible on a dark blue surface.
description_view_1: A single upright barrel is most prominent, with the other barrels less visible due to the angle.
description_view_2: All three barrels are clearly visible, showing their cylindrical shape and metal banding, with one barrel on its side.
description_view_3: One upright barrel is most visible, with the others partially obscured or out of view.
